applicability.reason: LayerManager is neutral infrastructure and does not own pointer-hover presentation.
Active presentation belongs to the registered overlay consumer.
LayerManager does not create focusable controls or own their focus indicators.
A layer may be inactive or non-dismissible, but the manager has no disabled widget state.
LayerManager has no editable value model.
Validation semantics belong to the overlay consumer.
Required is a form-control state outside layer coordination.
Loading feedback belongs to the registered overlay content.
An empty stack is absence of the component behavior rather than a rendered story state.
The stack is ordered and has no partial-selection state.
LayerManager does not announce workflow outcomes.
Warning semantics belong to visible overlay content.
Consumer recovery UI owns errors; the manager only coordinates stack state.
Destructive intent belongs to an explicit AlertDialog action rather than layer infrastructure.
